mapper.sql: id, plan_name, task_type, provider, scope_json, interval_type, adjust_type, trigger_type, cron_expr, include_auction, collect_frequency, enabled, description, last_run_at, last_task_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_data_sync_plan (plan_name, task_type, provider, scope_json, interval_type, adjust_type, trigger_type, cron_expr, include_auction, collect_frequency, enabled, description) VALUES (#{planName}, #{taskType}, #{provider}, #{scopeJson}, #{intervalType}, #{adjustType}, #{triggerType}, #{cronExpr}, #{includeAuction}, #{collectFrequency}, #{enabled}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE market_data_sync_plan SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE market_data_sync_plan SET last_task_id = #{lastTaskId}, last_run_at = #{lastRunAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM market_data_sync_plan
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM market_data_sync_plan WHERE trigger_type = #{triggerType} AND enabled = #{enabled} ORDER BY created_at ASC
